description.text:
If you have already booked Product Reviews as an extra feature, you are able to collect product reviews. To do so, move the slider to active. This way you can send Product Review invites to your customers. 

Are Product Reviews not yet part of your contract? Then [%s]book Product Reviews[%s] now.

help.text: Product Reviews help your customers form their own opinion about products they are interested in, based on the experiences of others. This way, you give your customers valuable guidance even before they make a purchase, which has a positive effect on the performance of your shop. Read more about [%s]Product Reviews[%s].

send.description:
When your customer places an order in your shop, [%s]shopsystem[%s] provides Trusted Shops with the Estimated Delivery date for this order. Trusted Shops can use this information to help you send review invites at the right time and avoid customers receiving review invites too early.

Please select your preferred trigger for sending review invites:
send.descriptionIntro:
When your customer places an order in your shop, [%s]shopsystem[%s] provides Trusted Shops with details about this order. Trusted Shops can use this information to help you send Review Invites at the right time and avoid customers receiving Review Invites too early.

Please select your preferred trigger for sending Review Invites:

export.description: In order to send out review invites to existing customers, please export a CSV file with their data. Be aware that you need the consent of the customer to share their email address with Trusted Shops.

help.text: If you do not want to collect reviews automated or if you want to manually invite customers to submit reviews in addition to the automated dispatch of invites, you can use the [%s]Review Collector[%s].

1.option: Export orders made in the past number of days:
1.title: 1. Export orders

description.text: Login to your [%s]eTrusted account[%s] and upload the CSV file. For more details please check “[%s]Send manual invites[%s]”

2.title: 2. Upload orders to send them review invites

export.title: Send review invites for previous orders

help.text:
The right timing for your Review Invites can be critical to ensure a good feedback rate.
Read more about [%s]sending review invites at the right time[%s].

note.text: Note: If you have set a sending delay in your [%s]eTrusted Control Centre[%s], the sending delay will be triggered once the Estimated Delivery Date has been reached

deliverydate.text: [%b]Use Estimated Delivery Date[%b] to send Review Invites.

note.text: Note: Review invites will be sent out as set up in your [%s]eTrusted Control Center[%s] without taking the Estimated Delivery Date into consideration.

notUse.text: Do not use Estimated Delivery date to send review invites.

check.text: Please check in the eTrusted Control Centre (invites rules or automation section) if the event type order_shipped is deactivated. If so, no Review Invites  will be sent out.

note.text: Note: If you have set a sending delay in your [%s]eTrusted Control Centre [%s], the sending delay will be triggered once the order status changed to “Shipped”.

orderstatus.text: [%b]Use order status “Shipped”[%b] to send Review Invites.

warning.text: Before using this option, obtain consent from your customers according to [%s]Art. 7 GDPR[%s]. More information can be found in the [%s]eTrusted Help Centre[%s].

note.text: Note: Review Invites will be sent out as set up in your [%s]eTrusted Control Centre[%s] without taking additional information into consideration.

standard.text: [%b]Use the eTrusted Control Centre settings[%b] to send Review Invites.

note.text: Note: If you have set a sending delay in your [%s]eTrusted Control Center[%s], the sending delay will be triggered once the Estimated Delivery Date has been reached.

use.text: Use Estimated Delivery Date to send Review Invites.

send.title: Send Review Invites at the right time

sendbyos.description: Choose the right touchpoint to send out your review invites

warning.text: For touchpoints outside the ‘checkout’, you must ensure that all recipients have effectively consented to their email address being sent to Trusted Shops in order to be reminded to submit a review. Further information can be found in the [%s]Trusted Shops Help Centre[%s].

delay.text: By default, your Review Invites will be sent out with an optimised delay based on Trusted Shops’ data. You can change this in the [%s]Control Centre[%s].

sendbyos.title: Send review invites at the right time to collect more and better reviews

upgradedescription.text: If you haven't booked product reviews yet, [%s]contact our sales team[%s] to upgrade.

v3.description: Send review invites to your customers at the right time to collect more reviews and improve the quality of your customer feedback.

previousOrders.description: Get more reviews by manually inviting previous customers to rate their experience. Make sure all customers have given their consent to receive review invite emails.

step1.exportLabel: Export orders made in the past
step1.title: Step 1: Export orders from {{shopSystemName}}

step2.description: After exporting your orders, upload the CSV file in your eTrusted account to send review invitations.
step2.title: Step 2: Upload orders in the Control Centre

previousOrders.title: Send review invites for past orders

rightTime.description: Choose when your customers receive a review invite by selecting a shop touchpoint.

help.text: The most commonly used touchpoint for sending reviews is customer checkout. To make sure customers get review invites at the right time, we add a standard delay of 5 days for the send-out. You can change this in the [%s]Trusted Shops Control Centre[%s].

productUpgrade.text: If you haven't booked product reviews yet, [%s]contact our sales team to upgrade[%s].

rightTime.title: Configure review invite settings

v3.title: Review invites

help.text: Need help with setup or configuration? [%s]Open integration guide[%s]

invites.description: Get more reviews by inviting your customers to leave a review after they’ve made a purchase. You can set up review invites in the Trusted Shops Control Centre.
invites.title: Review Invites

trstd_login.description: Protects your visitors from fakes. Once activated, the personal #trstd secret is displayed, proving that the site is authentic. Fake websites can't do this. A strong signal that also protects you from brand misuse.
trstd_login.title: #trstd login

trustbadge.description: Builds trust at first glance through the Trusted Shops brand. Displays your rating based on real orders and, if awarded, the Trusted Shops Trustmark with Buyer Protection across all payment methods.
trustbadge.title: Trustbadge

widgets.description: Show off what your customers say about your business. Choose how you want to display reviews and other trust elements across your website to attract new customers and boost sales.
widgets.title: Widgets

channel.caution: Changing channel mappings will reset any existing configuration for affected channels. Make sure to review your settings after saving changes.
channel.description: Match each [%]shopsystem[%] channel with the corresponding Trusted Shops channel to ensure reviews are collected correctly.
channel.title: Channel mapping

warning.description: Updating the channel mapping overwrites any existing configuration of those channels.
warning.title: Changes affect existing settings

settings.description: Match each shop channel with the corresponding eTrusted channel to ensure reviews are collected correctly.

disconnect.description: Disconnecting will remove all Trusted Shops features from your shop and delete your configuration settings.

help.text: Learn more about channel mapping, multi-channel setup, and troubleshooting in our [%s]Help Centre[%s].

disconnect.title: Disconnect integration
disconnect.warning: All your channel mappings, widget configurations, and active features will be removed. You will need to reconnect and reconfigure everything if you want to use Trusted Shops again.

help.text: Learn more about channel mapping, multi-channel setup, and troubleshooting in our [%s]Help Centre[%s].
help.title: Need help with integration?

popup.body:
By disconnecting, the following will be removed:

• All channel mappings and configurations
• Active Trustbadge and widgets
• Review invite settings
• Connection to Trusted Shops services
popup.description: This action will permanently remove the integration and all associated data.
popup.text: By clicking Disconnect, everything you have set up will be deleted. Restoring your settings is not possible.

settings.title: Channel mapping

about.description: The Trustbadge displays your Trusted Shops certification, star rating, and provides access to Buyer Protection. It automatically updates with your latest reviews and rating.
about.title: About the Trustbadge

automaticPlacement.description: The Trustbadge is automatically placed on your shop website and adapts seamlessly to both desktop and mobile layouts, building customer trust at every touchpoint.
automaticPlacement.title: Automatic Placement

trustbadge.description: Show off the trust you've earned with Trusted Shops' most recognisable element. Start collecting reviews and using Trusted Shops features by adding the Trustbadge to your website.

displayToggle.label: Display on this channel (with automatic placement)

integration.description: Select how you want to integrate the Trustbadge into your shop.
integration.title: Trustbadge configuration

popup.text: By deactivating the Trustbadge, it will no longer be displayed. Your Buyer Protection and the collection of reviews remain active.

expert.description: Manually edit the integration code to fit your needs for more control over placement and styling.

standard.description: Display the standard Trustbadge on all pages of your website and customise its position.

trustbadge.subtitel: Get started with Trusted Shops most essential feature

about.description: Widgets are created and managed in the Trusted Shops Control Centre. Once created, they automatically sync to your {{shopSystemName}} installation and can be placed across your website.
about.title: About Widgets

widgets.description: Show your stars, inspire trust. Display your Trusted Shops ratings and reviews across your website with customizable widgets that match your brand.

extension.description: The widget anchor appears under the product name and allows users to scroll down automatically to the main Full Review List widget.
extension.title: Anchor widget extension (optional):

widgets.noWidgets: You currently do not have any widgets for this channel, select another channel or create a new widget.

popup.text: Finish setting up your widgets via the widgets library in the Trusted Shops Control Centre. Click "configure" for your chosen widget, then come back to this page to place the widget.
popup.title: Almost there! Integrate a widget on your website.

widgets.title: Widgets
